research_question: Do causal coarse-depth features improve calibrated 60-second and 300-second depth-stress transition forecasts beyond marginal and pre-state transition baselines for BTCUSDT, ETHUSDT, and SOLUSDT on rolling untouched months?

primary_research_basis.paper: When Does Order Flow Matter? State-Dependent L2 Liquidity-State Transitions in Crypto Futures
adapted_elements: negative log likelihood and multiclass Brier proper scores
primary_research_basis.non_equivalence: The paper uses top-20 L2 books and event windows for BTCUSDT and ETHUSDT. Round 62 uses Binance's coarser cumulative percentage-band archive without event labels and adds SOLUSDT prospectively; it must be described as depth stress, not full L2 liquidity state.

descriptor_and_state_contract.fit_scope: separately for each symbol and rolling training fold
descriptor_and_state_contract.threshold: training-fold empirical upper tercile for each oriented descriptor
descriptor_and_state_contract.state: count descriptors at or above their threshold and cap at two

example_contract.anchor_spacing: equal to the forecast horizon within each contiguous UTC segment
example_contract.pre_snapshot: latest verified snapshot at or before the scheduled anchor with age at most 45 seconds
example_contract.post_snapshot: first verified snapshot at or after anchor plus horizon with lateness at most 45 seconds

rolling_split_contract.training: all complete eligible months strictly before the tuning month
rolling_split_contract.tuning: complete eligible month immediately before test

baselines: training-fold marginal post-state probabilities with Laplace smoothing
training-fold post-state probabilities conditional on pre-state with Laplace smoothing
model_contract.feature_normalization: none for trees; no cross-symbol pooled scale transformation
model_contract.compute_backend: OpenCL on a verified GPU when available, otherwise CPU

evaluation_contract.inference: paired UTC-day blocked permutation within each symbol horizon and test month
evaluation_contract.multiple_testing: Benjamini-Hochberg false discovery rate across symbol-horizon primary comparisons

stopping_rule.if_gate_passes: Authorize a separately frozen paired economic replay in which the existing strategy is evaluated with and without the depth-stress signal; do not authorize trading or claim profitability.
stopping_rule.if_gate_fails: Reject coarse depth stress as an added model layer and do not download the deferred bookTicker corpus without materially new exogenous evidence.

limitations: Cumulative percentage-band snapshots are not order-by-order L2 data and cannot reconstruct queue position, spread, top-of-book depth, or market impact.
Predicting depth stress is not predicting return direction, execution quality, drawdown, or profitability.
The archive cadence is roughly 30 seconds and cannot validate second-level or subsecond execution behavior.
SOLUSDT is a prospective extension beyond the paper and must pass independently.
Any later economic claim requires paired after-cost replay with spread, fees, latency, impact, funding, liquidation, outage, and capacity controls.
